zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice Dennys於1409年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓時，他的父親Gilbert Denys50歲，母親Margaret Russell23歲。他於1437年11月1日之前與Katherine Stradling在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1466年在英國格盧斯特斯爾奧爾維斯頓享年57歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾奧爾維斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maurice Dennys于1409年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓时，他的父亲Gilbert Denys50岁，母亲Margaret Russell23岁。他于1437年11月1日之前与Katherine Stradling在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1466年在英国格盧斯特斯爾奧爾維斯頓享年57岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾奧爾維斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dennys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice Dennys was born in 1409, in Siston, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Gilbert Denys, was 50 and his mother, Margaret Russell, was 23. He married Katherine Stradling before 1 November 1437, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1466, in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurice Dennys est né en 1409, à Siston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert Denys, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret Russell, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Stradling avant 1 novembre 1437, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1466, à Olveston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Olveston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maurice Dennys 1409 in Siston, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Denys 50 und seine Mutter Margaret Russell 23. Er hat vor 1. November 1437 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Stradling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1466 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice Dennys è nato il nel 1409 nel Siston, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Gilbert Denys, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Russell, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Stradling prima del 1 novembre 1437, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1466, nel Olveston, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Olveston, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maurice Dennysが1409年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアシストンで生まれた時，父Gilbert Denysは50歳，母Margaret Russellは23歳であった。1437年11月1日以前にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでKatherine Stradlingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1466年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアオルベストンで57歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアオルベストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maurice Dennys(이)가 1409년 영국 그루스스터실르 시스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Denys(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Russell(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1437년 11월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Katherine Stradling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1466년 영국 그루스스터실르 베스턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 베스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice Dennys nasceu em 1409, em Siston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert Denys, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Russell, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Stradling antes 1 de novembro de 1437, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1466, em Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice Dennys родился в 1409 г. в местности систон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Denys было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Russell, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Stradling перед 1 ноябрь 1437 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1466 г. в местности олвестон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности олвестон, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maurice Dennys nació en 1409, en Siston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert Denys, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Margaret Russell, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Katherine Stradling antes de 1 de noviembre de 1437, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1466, en Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
